citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 pm on 09-
March-2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by knocking on the door to the house, calling and
leaving a message, sending a text message, and waiting 30 minutes before leaving the facility. Failure to provide access
to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide
access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 pm on 09-
March-2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by knocking on the door to the house, calling and 
leaving a message, sending a text message, and waiting 30 minutes before leaving the facility. Failure to provide access 
to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide 
access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
